tool.name: youtube_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple queries on YouTube in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling youtube_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'react tutorial,vue tutorial,angular tutorial'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'python basics,javascript basics,rust basics')
